message:
feat(core): add Beads bridge for swarm work queue integration (ft-3681t.3.3)

Add BeadsImporter that reads .beads/issues.jsonl and imports actionable
beads into SwarmWorkQueue with dependency graph preservation. Includes
BeadRecord/BeadDependency/BeadsSyncReport types, effort estimation
heuristics, status mapping, and 11 comprehensive tests covering parsing,
sync, idempotency, dependency handling, and error cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
